_comment: GitHub Projects v2 Configuration - Example with Discovery Instructions
_setup: Follow these steps to configure fetch-story for your GitHub Project

_discovery_instructions.command1: gh api graphql -f query='query { organization(login: "YOUR_ORG") { projectsV2(first: 10) { nodes { id title } } } }'
_discovery_instructions.note1: Or for user projects: query { viewer { projectsV2(first: 10) { nodes { id title } } } }
_discovery_instructions.step2: Get field IDs for your project
_discovery_instructions.command2: gh api graphql -f query='query { node(id: "YOUR_PROJECT_ID") { ... on ProjectV2 { fields(first: 20) { nodes { ... on ProjectV2SingleSelectField { id name options { id name } } } } } } }'
_discovery_instructions.note2: Replace YOUR_PROJECT_ID with projectId from step 1

example.Status_field: Find 'Status' field -> copy its 'id' to fieldIds.status
example.Priority_field: Find 'Priority' field -> copy its 'id' to fieldIds.priority
example.Status_options: Find 'Ready' option under Status -> copy its 'id' to optionIds.status.ready

_discovery_instructions.step4: Copy story-workflow-config.example.json to .claude/story-workflow-config.json and update with your IDs
